lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜出门前｜入户镜前
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 用真实镜前记录建立完整穿搭和顾客代入。
lifestyleScenes.description: 入户镜前自然确认穿搭，手机柔和遮脸，鞋子完整清楚。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Create a real entryway mirror outfit record before leaving home. Use the phone only for the mirror record, keep the styling wearable, and keep both sneakers clearly readable.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜出门前｜玄关
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 呈现普通一天开始前的真实穿着状态。
lifestyleScenes.description: 玄关门边自然停留，空手整理袖口或外层，鞋子完整。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a believable home entryway departure moment with soft doorway light, relaxed empty hands, a small clothing adjustment, and complete readable sneakers.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜日常结束｜回家进门
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 补充穿了一天之后仍然自然体面的状态。
lifestyleScenes.description: 回家进门的短暂停留，空手、松弛、脚下清楚。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Show a calm return-home threshold moment after an ordinary day, with relaxed empty hands, natural clothing folds, grounded feet, and clearly visible sneakers.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜工作日｜通勤路上
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 证明鞋子能进入普通工作日。
lifestyleScenes.description: 真实通勤路线上的短步行或停留，人物像朋友随手拍。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Show a real weekday commute with a short natural step or quiet pause, relaxed empty hands, believable city depth, and complete readable sneakers without campaign energy.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜工作日｜写字楼门口
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 把产品放进成熟都市女性的工作日。
lifestyleScenes.description: 写字楼门口自然走路或等人，低压力、鞋子清楚。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Show a refined office-entrance moment with quiet daily rhythm, natural walking posture or a short waiting pause, relaxed empty hands, and clear sneakers without campaign posing.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜工作日｜停车后步行
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 呈现从停车到办公室的真实短距离移动。
lifestyleScenes.description: 停车区到办公室的干净步行路线，动作简单。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a believable parking-to-office walking transition with a short safe step, relaxed empty hands, clean ground contact, and no car-showcase mood.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜工作日｜地铁商场通道
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 补充真实城市通道中的移动感。
lifestyleScenes.description: 地铁或商场连接通道，背景克制，脚步稳定。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a clean but lived-in metro or mall passage with a compact walking step, relaxed empty hands, realistic indoor depth, and no shopping-mall campaign styling.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜工作日｜停车场到电梯口
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 增加室内通勤过渡的真实使用证明。
lifestyleScenes.description: 停车场到电梯口的短暂停留或等待，地面接触清楚。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Show a calm parking-area to elevator-lobby transition with believable indoor light, relaxed empty hands, stable posture, and clear shoe-floor contact.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜周末｜城市散步
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 呈现不刻意营业的周末穿着状态。
lifestyleScenes.description: 安静城市步行路线，步子短，背景有真实生活痕迹。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a quiet weekend city walk with a short natural stride, relaxed empty hands, real sidewalk texture, and a candid customer-photo feeling.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜日常｜楼下咖啡外带
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 加入短暂、普通、容易代入的楼下停留。
lifestyleScenes.description: 便利店或咖啡外带点附近，杯子放在台面，不拿在手中。
lifestyleScenes.scenePreference: 楼下便利店 / 咖啡外带
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a believable downstairs convenience-store or coffee-pickup pause. Keep any cup placed on a nearby counter rather than held, keep hands relaxed, and keep the sneakers readable.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜周末｜咖啡店门口
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 增加小红书生活方式代入。
lifestyleScenes.description: 咖啡店门口轻松停留，低饱和真实街景。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a restrained real cafe exterior with natural daylight and a candid customer-like pause. Place any cup on a table or ledge, keep hands relaxed, and keep the shoes readable.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜周末｜咖啡馆内
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 补充坐下后仍然自然、鞋子仍然可读的状态。
lifestyleScenes.description: 咖啡馆窗边或椅侧自然坐姿，杯子留在桌面。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a quiet cafe-interior seated or standing pause with any cup kept on the table, relaxed empty hands, natural posture, and at least one complete sneaker visible.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜周末｜朋友午餐
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 呈现轻松社交场景里的真实穿着。
lifestyleScenes.description: 白天朋友午餐，轻微转向同伴，手部自然。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Show a relaxed daytime lunch moment with a subtle turn toward a friend, hands naturally empty or resting, sparse tableware, and unobstructed sneakers.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜周末｜美术馆
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 增加安静文化空间中的审美选择感。
lifestyleScenes.description: 美术馆慢走或停留，不触碰作品，不拿道具。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a restrained gallery walking or standing moment with natural attention toward the artwork or nearby space, relaxed empty hands, readable sneakers, and no event posing or touching artwork.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜周末｜书店门口
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 让内容更安静，有真实审美选择感。
lifestyleScenes.description: 书店或杂志店门口轻松停留，书放在身边而非手中。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a quiet bookstore or magazine-shop exterior with a book or magazine placed nearby rather than held, relaxed hands, a calm side gaze, and naturally readable sneakers.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜周末｜花店
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 加入真实周末采购和柔和城市色彩。
lifestyleScenes.description: 花店门口安静停留，花束作为店面背景，不手持。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a real understated flower-shop exterior with flowers remaining as restrained storefront or nearby background detail, relaxed empty hands, mature styling, and clear sneakers.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜周末｜安静街角
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 补充非硬广的普通城市停留。
lifestyleScenes.description: 安静街区自然站立或短步行，真实路面和树影。
lifestyleScenes.scenePreference: 城市街角 / 安静街区
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a quiet real city corner with a natural standing pause or short walk, relaxed empty hands, real pavement and soft street depth, without campaign styling.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜社区｜精品超市
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 证明鞋子能进入普通采购和社区日常。
lifestyleScenes.description: 超市入口或社区商店边缘，购物物品放在旁边。
lifestyleScenes.scenePreference: 精品超市 / 日常采购
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a believable premium grocery or neighborhood-shop entrance. Place any paper bag beside the body or in the background rather than in hand, keep hands relaxed, and keep the sneakers unobstructed.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜社区｜市集买菜
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 增加成熟顾客真实生活节奏。
lifestyleScenes.description: 社区市集或小型生鲜店入口，物品克制放置。
lifestyleScenes.scenePreference: 社区市集 / 精品买菜
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a clean community market or small produce-shop edge with restrained produce cues placed nearby, relaxed empty hands, believable pavement, and clear sneakers.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜社区｜周末轻采购
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 加入不夸张的周末小型采购路线。
lifestyleScenes.description: 社区商业入口或店外短暂停留，购物袋不手持。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Show a light weekend purchase near a quiet neighborhood shop. Keep any shopping bag placed nearby rather than held, use relaxed empty hands, and preserve clear shoe visibility.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜社区｜公园慢走
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 呈现普通步行中的舒适和真实比例。
lifestyleScenes.description: 城市公园干净步道，小步幅慢走，不做户外广告。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a clean urban-park path with a short natural walking step, relaxed empty hands, restrained greenery, and no hiking or sports-advertising mood.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜社区｜步道
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 补充低压力、可反复穿着的社区路线。
lifestyleScenes.description: 社区步道短走或停留，背景有轻微生活痕迹。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a real neighborhood walking path with a compact step or soft standing pause, relaxed empty hands, subtle greenery, and believable daily-life texture.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜轻旅行｜酒店日常
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 呈现短途旅行中一双鞋的省心程度。
lifestyleScenes.description: 安静酒店空间准备出门，行李只做背景。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a calm hotel travel moment before leaving, with luggage kept as a small background cue, relaxed empty hands, warm neutral light, and clearly readable sneakers.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜轻旅行｜酒店走廊
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 补充真实旅行动线中的短距离移动。
lifestyleScenes.description: 酒店走廊短步行，地面和鞋子接触清楚。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Show a short hotel-corridor walk with relaxed empty hands, quiet warm-neutral architecture, clean ground contact, and no luxury-resort advertising mood.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜轻旅行｜酒店房间镜前
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 通过旅行镜前图判断鞋子能否减少行李负担。
lifestyleScenes.description: 酒店房间镜前记录，行李角落克制，手机遮脸。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a calm hotel-room mirror outfit record with a tidy suitcase corner and warm neutral light. Use the phone as the only handheld object and keep both sneakers readable.

lifestyleScenes.name: 图｜轻旅行｜周末出发
lifestyleScenes.purpose: 呈现短途出发时鞋子和日常衣物的关系。
lifestyleScenes.description: 住宅或酒店门口出发前停留，旅行包只作背景。
lifestyleScenes.extraRequirement: Use a quiet weekend-trip departure near a building or hotel threshold, with any travel bag placed nearby rather than held, relaxed empty hands, and clear sneakers.
